name: release-operator
description: Run a CLI/app release end-to-end: verify state, update changelog/version, test packaging, commit, tag, push, publish, and verify installs.

interface.shortDescription: Run a CLI/app release end-to-end: verify state, update changelog/version, test packaging, commit, tag, push, publish, and verify installs.
interface.longDescription: Run a CLI/app release end-to-end: verify state, update changelog/version, test packaging, commit, tag, push, publish, and verify installs. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Run the release end-to-end. Verify tests and package contents, update changelog/version, commit/tag/push, publish, then verify install/update locally and on any named remote hosts.
